CREATE TABLE test_sessions (id INT PRIMARY KEY, session_handle VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM test_sessions WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_sessions WHERE session_handle LIKE 'session_handle_%');
SELECT session_handle FROM test_sessions WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_sessions);
CREATE TABLE test_users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(255));
SELECT u.username, s.session_handle FROM test_users u JOIN test_sessions s ON u.user_id = s.id WHERE u.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM test_users WHERE username='admin');
CREATE TABLE test_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, action VARCHAR(255), session_handle VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_logs (log_id, action, session_handle) VALUES (1, 'connect', 'session_handle_1');
INSERT INTO test_logs (log_id, action, session_handle) VALUES (2, 'disconnect', 'session_handle_2');
SELECT action FROM test_logs WHERE session_handle IN (SELECT session_handle FROM test_sessions WHERE id = 1);
SELECT u.username, l.action FROM test_users u JOIN test_logs l ON u.user_id = 1 WHERE l.session_handle = 'session_handle_1';
